fix_hints: Provide a non-empty block name after data_, e.g. data_my_block.
Avoid whitespace between data_ and the block name; the name must immediately follow the keyword.
message_template: 'data_' is missing its data-block name. CIF syntax requires data_<block-name> with a non-empty block name.

occurrences.message: 'data_' is missing its data-block name. CIF syntax requires data_<block-name> with a non-empty block name.
